response.justification: Candidate vastly exceeds the junior/mid experience requirement with 15+ years across fullstack, embedded, and infrastructure work, and brings strong TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, and Kubernetes exposure directly relevant to the platform. However, the role is explicitly entry-level with on-site presence required, creating a significant seniority/compensation mismatch risk and likely retention concerns. Berlin location and German basics align with the work environment, making an interview worthwhile to assess motivation fit.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack background with AWS and Kubernetes exposure
Berlin-based, aligning with on-site requirement; basic German
Demonstrated platform-building experience including data integration and CRM-adjacent work
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level position — high flight risk
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js explicitly listed; primary DB experience is MongoDB
Likely salary expectations exceed junior/mid budget
